## view\_base class

视图基类

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class mk_view_base extends mk_life_cycle 
```
**Extends:** [mk\_life\_cycle](../life_cycle/)

## Remarks

- 添加编辑器快捷操作

- 添加弹窗动画配置

- 独立展示配置
